snippet: Xuper TV is an entertainment app developed by Appy Infotech. Xuper TV has been downloaded 2.3 million times. In the last 30 days, the app was downloaded 1.2 million times. name: Xuper TV, successor to Magis TV: what's changing and what are
snippet: Xuper TV takes over from Magis TV with a simple rebranding and minimal aesthetic overhaul. The app is distributed as an APK outside of official stores and goes viral on Telegram and social networks. Investigations point to intrusive permissions and risks of malware, data theft, and hidden software.
